heroHeadline: Sheinbaum at 535 Days: Record FDI, Judicial Overhaul, and US Tariff Standoffs
heroSubtitle: Mexico's first female president navigates Trump's tariff threats, a historic judicial election sweep, and a 30% homicide decline against a backdrop of Sinaloa cartel civil war.
footerNote: Data sourced from Diario Oficial, INEGI, Banco de México, SNSP, Secretaría de Economía, Reuters, AP, El Universal, Reforma, Animal Político, Wilson Center, AS/COA
